codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed zero in-scope critical violations. Two PROPOSED_FIX items: (1) Standard 10 rationale was slightly mis-scoped — formally targets command/agent .md files, not JSON manifest paths; additionally verified manifest path integrity as bonus check. (2) dev-report file is under docs/ and should be noted as excluded from violation scope, reviewed for JSON sanity only. One OBSERVATION_ONLY: pre-existing Standard 6/11 findings in other files are advisory/out-of-scope and must not be added to this task's violations list.

findings.issue: Standard 10 rationale is slightly mis-scoped. Standard 10 formally targets script references in command/agent .md files and Python imports, not JSON manifest file paths.
findings.proposed_fix: Change wording to: 'Standard 10: N/A under formal scope; manifest path integrity was additionally checked, and all 8 referenced test files exist.'
findings.rationale: Updated standards_checked_notes.standard_10_dangling_references to clarify formal scope and note the additional integrity check.

findings.issue: docs/dev/dev-report-dev-20260526-203808-manifest.json is under docs/, which style-inspector scope excludes. Should not count as an audited style file if strict scope accounting matters.
findings.proposed_fix: Note: 'Dev report is a docs artifact and excluded from style-inspector violation scope; reviewed only for JSON sanity/no conflict markers.'
findings.rationale: Added scope_notes section and clarified in standards_checked_notes that docs/ file is excluded from violation scope.

findings.issue: Pre-existing Standard 6/11 findings elsewhere should remain advisory/out-of-scope and should not be added to this task's violations list.
findings.rationale: Confirmed: no pre-existing findings from other files were included in this task's violations list.
